final_answer:
Right now the code has **no `GOLD` reward formula and no `GILT:GOLD` staking ratio**; rewards are based on validator stake plus delegated stake in the existing staking token/POL-style contract.

Why this matters: the current code is inherited staking logic, not the final `GILT` + `GOLD` model we were discussing.

Current formula in code:

```text
checkpoint_reward =
  checkpoint_base_reward
  * signed_stake_power
  / current_total_stake
```

Then:

```text
proposer_bonus = checkpoint_reward * proposerBonus / 100
```

Default `proposerBonus` is `10`, so proposer gets 10%.

Then the remaining reward is distributed across signing validators by stake power:

```text
reward_per_stake +=
  (checkpoint_reward - proposer_bonus)
  * 1e25
  / signed_stake_power
```

For each validator:

```text
validator_total_earned =
  (reward_per_stake - validator_initial_reward_per_stake)
  * (validator_self_stake + delegated_amount)
  / 1e25
```

If the validator has delegators, that validator’s earned reward is split like this:

```text
validator_base_reward =
  validator_self_stake
  * validator_total_earned
  / (validator_self_stake + delegated_amount)
```

```text
validator_commission =
  (validator_total_earned - validator_base_reward)
  * commission_rate
  / 100
```

```text
validator_final_reward =
  validator_base_reward + validator_commission
```

```text
delegators_reward =
  validator_total_earned - validator_final_reward
```

Then delegators split their pool by validator-share tokens:

```text
reward_per_share += delegators_reward * 1e25 / total_validator_shares
```

```text
user_reward =
  (reward_per_share - user_initial_reward_per_share)
  * user_shares
  / 1e25
```

Confirmed code locations:

[StakeManager.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/contracts/staking/stakeManager/StakeManager.sol):725 calculates checkpoint reward.

[StakeManager.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/contracts/staking/stakeManager/StakeManager.sol):798 applies proposer bonus.

[StakeManager.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/contracts/staking/stakeManager/StakeManager.sol):807 updates reward per stake.

[StakeManager.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/contracts/staking/stakeManager/StakeManager.sol):877 calculates validator eligible reward.

[StakeManager.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/contracts/staking/stakeManager/StakeManager.sol):911 splits validator vs delegator reward.

[ValidatorShare.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/contracts/staking/validatorShare/ValidatorShare.sol):505 calculates reward per share.

[ValidatorShare.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/pos-contracts/contracts/staking/validatorShare/ValidatorShare.sol):518 calculates user reward.

What should be done next: if you want the real Gold Chain model, current code must be changed because there is currently no `GOLD` staking reward path and no `GILT:GOLD` ratio logic.
